description_long: This object is a Fujifilm X-T2 digital camera, featuring a robust black body with a textured grip and multiple dials for manual control. The front showcases a prominent interchangeable lens with detailed focus and zoom rings, while the top is equipped with several control dials and a hot shoe mount for accessories. The back of the camera includes a large LCD screen, a viewfinder, and an array of buttons for menu navigation and settings adjustment. The camera body is primarily constructed from metal and high-quality plastic, with rubberized sections for improved handling. The lens barrel is marked with focal length and aperture indicators, and the overall design is compact yet professional, suitable for both street and studio photography. The branding 'FUJIFILM X-T2' is clearly visible on the front, indicating its make and model.
description: A black Fujifilm X-T2 digital camera with a textured grip, multiple control dials, and a large interchangeable lens. The camera features a prominent LCD screen and detailed manual controls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the textured grip, control dials on top, and the full length of the lens barrel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large LCD screen, viewfinder, and various control buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lens, top dials, and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the 'FUJIFILM X-T2' branding, lens glass, and symmetrical control layout.
